title: Manufacturing Engineer - Exide Industries - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Exide Industries - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Exide Industries in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Exide Industries:
Exide Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Exide Industries!
